zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Staynforth於大約1365年出生在英國越可爾吉格萊斯維其可時，她的父親Robert Stainforth32歲，母親Mrs Robert Stainforth33歲。她於1377年與Sir Richard VII Tempest結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年之後在英國越可爾布拉可維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Staynforth于大约1365年出生在英国越可爾吉格萊斯維其可时，她的父亲Robert Stainforth32岁，母亲Mrs Robert Stainforth33岁。她于1377年与Sir Richard VII Tempest结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年之后在英国越可爾布拉可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Staynforth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: mainly a variant of   Stanford  , which may have migrated to North Yorkshire and Northumberland from Norfolk and Suffolk by the North Sea coastal trade.

variants.name: Stanford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, including Stanford (Bedfordshire, Kent), Stanford Dingley and Stanford in the Vale (Berkshire), Stanford le Hope and Stanford Rivers (Essex), Stanford Bishop and Stanford Regis (Herefordshire), Stanford on Avon (Northamptonshire), Stanford on Soar (Nottinghamshire), and Stanford on Teme (Worcestershire); also from Stamford (Lincolnshire, Northumberland), Stamford Bridge (East Yorkshire), and Standford in Headley (Hampshire), all of which appear as Stanford in medieval documents. The placenames all derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ford ‘ford’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 16th century, where it is also found under the variant Stankard.

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America, Thomas Stanford of England, settled in Charlestown, MA, in the mid 17th century and started a family line that includes Leland Stanford (1824–93), the railroad developer who was governor of CA, a US senator, and the founding benefactor of Stanford University.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Staynforth was born about 1365, in Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Stainforth, was 32 and her mother, Mrs Robert Stainforth, was 33. She married Sir Richard VII Tempest in 1377. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1430, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Staynforth est née environ 1365, à Giggleswick, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Stainforth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs Robert Stainforth, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard VII Tempest en 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1430, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Staynforth um 1365 in Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Stainforth 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs Robert Stainforth 33. Sie hat 1377 Sir Richard VII Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1430 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Staynforth è nata il circa 1365 nel Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Stainforth, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs Robert Stainforth, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard VII Tempest nel 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1430, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Staynforthが約1365年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギググレスウィックで生まれた時，父Robert Stainforthは32歳，母Mrs Robert Stainforthは33歳であった。1377年にSir Richard VII Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Staynforth(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 요르크실르 지글레스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Stainforth(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Robert Stainforth(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1377년 Sir Richard VII Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 이후 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Staynforth nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Giggleswick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Stainforth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Robert Stainforth, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard VII Tempest em 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1430, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Staynforth родилась около 1365 г. в местности гиглесвикк, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Stainforth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert Stainforth, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard VII Tempest в 1377 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1430 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия.
